machine, when VMWare is opened, choose file "zumy-ee106a", and double click. VirtualBox Install Virtual Box 5.0 and Extension Pack. Install dmks on host if using Ubuntu with apt-get. Download Ubuntu 14.04.3 ISO. Create new Ubuntu 64 bit VM with 4G RA

4.04.3 ISO. Create new Ubuntu 64 bit VM with 4G RAM and 16G disk space and install Ubuntu to is using above ISO, credentials humanoid/WdnmR4$~. Follow instructions for installing Guest Additions on VM. Make sure you start at section 4.2.2.1.1 and upd

. Make sure you start at section 4.2.2.1.1 and update, upgrade, install dmks, and restart before installing Guest Additions. Install ROS Indigo on VM. Install vrep PRO EDU V3.2.3 to /opt/vrep. Create and initialize ROS workspace in /home/humanoid/sim

and initialize ROS workspace in /home/humanoid/sim_ws. Follow vrep ROS tutorial. Suggest symbolic linking generated libv_repExtRos.so and rosBubbleRob executable files to vrep directory rather than copy paste. At this point controlTypeExamples.ttt sh

py paste. At this point controlTypeExamples.ttt should run. Restore October 03, 2015, at 12:29 am by abuchan - Added line 3: Download the compressed image from the server. (user: zumy_user, pass: SCfIGPjw0A) Restore August 19, 2015, at 06:09 pm by jl
